# Estrecho Ormuz

> Independent bilingual monitor of the Strait of Hormuz operational status.

- Home: https://estrechoormuz.com/
- English: https://estrechoormuz.com/en.html
- Analysis hub: https://estrechoormuz.com/analisis.html
- Meaning of closure: https://estrechoormuz.com/que-significa-cierre-estrecho-ormuz.html
- Energy and economic impact: https://estrechoormuz.com/como-afectaria-cierre-ormuz-petroleo-gas-economia.html
- Maritime traffic verification: https://estrechoormuz.com/como-comprobar-trafico-maritimo-operativo-ormuz.html
- Methodology: https://estrechoormuz.com/metodologia.html
- Sources: https://estrechoormuz.com/fuentes.html
- Current machine-readable status: https://estrechoormuz.com/status.json
- History: https://estrechoormuz.com/history.json
- RSS: https://estrechoormuz.com/feed.xml

The operational classification is informational and should not be used as the sole basis for navigation, security, investment or logistics decisions.
